parameters.apprise_url_plus: napi://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.client_id_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.client_secret_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own NotificationAPI destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise napi:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway channels skip Apprise and transform the envelope into a native NotificationAPI sender payload delivered straight to api.notificationapi.com.
parameters.gateway_body_template: {"type":"apprise","user":{"id":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "notify") *}},"message":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(( (_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="" ) and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to NotificationAPI sender endpoint (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment NotificationAPI destinations, direct

client_id_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's NotificationAPI client id

client_secret_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's NotificationAPI client secret

targets_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's NotificationAPI targets
